channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Linzer Straße from junction Hüttelbergstraße and Bergmillergasse to junction Wolfersberggasse
item.description: The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1. [19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop of the affected bus lines at the Bujattigasse will be temporarily moved to the Wolfersberggasse ON 1.
[19.04.2026 – 31.07.2026]

item.title: U2: Right Vienna line from crossing Ramperstorffergasse to crossing Pilgramgasse and Pilgrambrücke
item.description: For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
For the new construction of the underground station of the U2 Pilgramgasse, the right-hand Vienna line from the Ramperstorffergasse to the Pilgramgasse is blocked for vehicle traffic.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: 31: Impurity
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: contamination. [On 24.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: contamination.
[On 24.05.2026]

item.title: Universitätsstraße crossing Landesgerichtsstraße and Garnisongasse
item.description: Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network. [Since 03.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Transport measures are largely taken over by the construction works metro, also in the streets of the lower road network.
[Since 03.05.2026]

item.title: Wien Westbahnhof: Mariahilfer Street from Europaplatz and Mariahilfer Belt to Palmgasse and Gerstnerstraße
item.description: The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic. [25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The actual area of Mariahilfer Straße is to be closed for vehicle traffic.
[25.05.2026 – 30.06.2026]

item.title: U4: Front Zollamtsstraße from Marxergasse and Small Marxerbrücke to Unnamed Traffic Area and Wheel
item.description: Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna … [Since 01.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to the renovation of the tunnel ceiling of the U4 line or the necessary preparatory work in the road area as well as the repair of shafts by the Vienna …
[Since 01.02.2026]

item.title: Favoritenstraße from crossing Landgutgasse to crossing Keplerplatz and Keplergasse
item.description: The repair and redesign work in the Favoritenstraße pedestrian zone will be carried out following the ongoing sealing work of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG at … [Since 19.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The repair and redesign work in the Favoritenstraße pedestrian zone will be carried out following the ongoing sealing work of Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG at …
[Since 19.04.2026]

item.title: Maxingstraße from crossing Hanselmayergasse to crossing Trauttmansdorffgasse
item.description: The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line … [Since 06.04.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The affected bus lines are redirected, the passenger information is provided by Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG. The installation of a district heating line …
[Since 06.04.2026]

item.title: U6: Underpass Pulverturmgasse between the inner and outer Währinger belt
item.description: The general renovation of the U6 route is carried out in the actual area when the passage is blocked (at the level of 9, Pulverturmgasse or 18, Sternwartestraße) between the inner and … [28.03.2026 – 31.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The general renovation of the U6 route is carried out in the actual area when the passage is blocked (at the level of 9, Pulverturmgasse or 18, Sternwartestraße) between the inner and …
[28.03.2026 – 31.08.2026]

item.title: Antonsplatz from 13 to 18
item.description: The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the idle time of public transport, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway. [18.03.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The pipe laying work is carried out during the night during the idle time of public transport, while keeping a minimum of 2,50 m wide residual runway.
[18.03.2026 – 30.06.2026]
